title: webhook — HTTP middleware
description: One middleware: `webhooks.verify` — parameterised signature verification for inbound webhooks. Loads two secret config keys for rotation grace on the inbound side (primary + previous). Refuses with 401 on mismatch.

middleware.description: Parameterised: `webhooks.verify:cfg.key.primary,cfg.key.previous`. Reads inbound signature per provider convention (HMAC-SHA256 via X-Webhook-Signature by default; strategies pluggable per provider). Verifies against config('cfg.key.primary') OR config('cfg.key.previous') to allow rotation grace. Refuses with 401 on mismatch — no auth ticket, no controller.

returnsOn401.reason: Signature failed verification against both primary and previous secrets. Logged with the invalid signature fragment for support diagnostics.

priorityContext.note: Priority 15 places verification BEFORE rate limiting so invalid signatures never consume the rate limiter budget.
